flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 26% at Fulton-Montgomery Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (953 vs 1.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fulton-Montgomery Community College rose 19% between 2021 and 2024 ($5.7k → $6.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fulton-Montgomery Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (7.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Fulton-Montgomery Community College rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 (49.0% → 58.0%).
